name: proc_creation_win_malware_formbook
raw_query: any where ((process.parent.command_line like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) and process.parent.command_line:"*.exe") and ((process.command_line:"*/c*" and process.command_line:"*del*" and process.command_line:"*C:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*") or (process.command_line:"*/c*" and process.command_line:"*del*" and process.command_line:"*C:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Desktop\\*") or (process.command_line:"*/C*" and process.command_line:"*type nul >*" and process.command_line:"*C:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Desktop\\*")) and process.command_line:"*.exe"
